title: Map Editor
description: Designer creates and edits maps: drawing tiles, resizing, configuring objectives, patches, processors, and generating terrain

actors.name: Designer
actors.description: Primary user who creates and edits game maps

actors.name: Steam Platform
actors.description: External system for publishing/viewing workshop maps (steam-only)

use_cases.name: Open Map Editor
use_cases.description: Open editor with new 200x200 map (default) or existing map via beginEditMap(Fi file)

use_cases.name: Draw Tiles
use_cases.description: Paint tiles using pencil, fill, spray, line, or eraser tools via touch/mouse input on MapView
use_cases.source: MapView: touchDown, touchDragged, touchUp → tool.touched(x,y) / tool.touchedLine()

use_cases.name: Select Drawing Tool
use_cases.description: Choose from: zoom, pick (eyedropper), line, pencil, eraser, fill, spray. Keyboard shortcuts per EditorTool.key. Right-click temporarily switches to eraser; shift/alt temporarily picks.

use_cases.name: Select Block
use_cases.description: Choose a block from the scrollable block selection panel. Search by name. Sorted by CoreBlock > synthetic > overlay > id.

use_cases.name: Select Team
use_cases.description: Pick a draw team from Team.baseTeams color buttons; sets editor.drawTeam

use_cases.name: Set Brush Size
use_cases.description: Drag slider to set editor.brushSize from MapEditor.brushSizes array

use_cases.name: Rotate Block
use_cases.description: Rotate placement block 90° CW via button or R key (CCW with E key). editor.rotation cycles 0-3.

use_cases.name: Toggle Grid
use_cases.description: Toggle grid overlay on MapView. Draws quadrant lines + center axes. Ctrl+G shortcut.

use_cases.name: Center View
use_cases.description: Reset map pan offset to (0,0). Desktop only.

use_cases.name: Zoom / Pan Map
use_cases.description: Zoom via scroll wheel or pinch gesture (0.2x–20x). Pan via arrow keys or zoom tool drag. Middle-click temporarily enables zoom tool.

use_cases.name: Undo / Redo Edit
use_cases.description: Undo with Ctrl+Z, redo with Ctrl+Y or Ctrl+Shift+Z. Buttons disabled when stack empty.

use_cases.name: Toggle View Layers
use_cases.description: Toggle visibility of buildings (recacheShadows), terrain (recacheTerrain), and floor layers via checkboxes.

use_cases.name: Save Map
use_cases.description: Save map to maps storage. Validates name; if empty, opens MapInfoDialog. Serialises rules to tags. Ctrl+S shortcut. Returns saved Map object.

use_cases.name: Load Map
use_cases.description: Load existing custom map via MapLoadDialog → editor.beginEdit(map)

use_cases.name: Import Map
use_cases.description: Import from: (a) saved map list, (b) .msav file via file chooser → MapIO.createMap(), (c) PNG image → editor.beginEdit(pixmap). Max size: MapResizeDialog.maxSize (600).

use_cases.name: Export Map
use_cases.description: Export as (a) .msav file via MapIO.writeMap() or (b) PNG image via MapIO.writeImage()

use_cases.name: Resize Map
use_cases.description: Set new width/height (50–600) and optional shiftX/shiftY for content shift. Opens MapResizeDialog → editor.resize(w,h,shiftX,shiftY).

use_cases.name: Generate Terrain
use_cases.description: Open MapGenerateDialog. Add/remove/reorder/randomize GenerateFilter pipeline. Preview result in live pixmap texture (async). Apply filters to editor tiles.
use_cases.source: MapGenerateDialog: showAdd(), rebuildFilters(), update() async, applyToEditor(), apply()

use_cases.name: Edit Map Info
use_cases.description: Edit name (max 50), description (max 1000), author (max 50) in MapInfoDialog. Tags stored in editor.tags StringMap.

use_cases.name: Configure Game Rules
use_cases.description: Open CustomRulesDialog from MapInfoDialog to set game rules (state.rules)

use_cases.name: Configure Waves
use_cases.description: Open WaveInfoDialog from MapInfoDialog to define enemy wave schedule

use_cases.name: Configure Objectives
use_cases.description: Open MapObjectivesDialog (canvas-based editor) to add/edit/remove MapObjective nodes and fields. Supports reflection-based field editing with annotations (Multiline, LogicCode).

use_cases.name: Configure Generation Filters (Saved)
use_cases.description: Edit persistent genfilters for the map (stored in editor.tags 'genfilters' as JSON). Separate from in-game generate.

use_cases.name: Configure Locales
use_cases.description: Edit map localization strings via MapLocalesDialog. Reads/writes editor.tags 'locales' JSON.

use_cases.name: Configure World Processors
use_cases.description: Open MapProcessorsDialog to view/add/edit LogicBlock world processors placed on map tiles.
use_cases.source: MapProcessorsDialog: adds worldProcessor block to first free non-synthetic tile

use_cases.name: Configure Patches
use_cases.description: Open MapPatchesDialog to add/remove/import map patches (state.patcher.patches). Guide URL link provided.

use_cases.name: Playtest Map
use_cases.description: Save map then launch playtest via MapPlayDialog (or skip dialog with Shift-click). Auto-selects best gamemode (survival > attack > sandbox).

use_cases.name: Edit In-Game
use_cases.description: Launch editor map in live game with editor gamemode rules. Spawns player unit at map center. Resume editing via resumeEditing().

use_cases.name: Generate Sector
use_cases.description: Open SectorGenerateDialog for sector-specific generation.

use_cases.name: Publish to Workshop
use_cases.description: Save map and publish/view on Steam Workshop. Validates description length ≥ 4 and valid gamemode spawn. Steam-only feature.

use_cases.name: Copy / Paste Filters (Clipboard)
use_cases.description: Copy filter configuration to clipboard as JSON or paste/load from clipboard in MapGenerateDialog.

use_cases.name: Exit Editor
use_cases.description: Exit editor with unsaved-change confirmation dialog. ESC key opens menu; quit button triggers tryExit().

relationships.note: save() opens MapInfoDialog if name is empty
Import extends load — multiple import sources
MapInfoDialog provides access to Gen Filters
MapInfoDialog provides access to World Processors

key_classes: MapEditorDialog extends Dialog implements Disposable — main orchestrator; owns MapView, all sub-dialogs
MapView extends Element implements GestureListener — canvas; handles touch/mouse → tool.touched(x,y)
MapInfoDialog extends BaseDialog — name/desc/author + 7 sub-dialog launchers
MapResizeDialog extends BaseDialog — width/height/shiftX/shiftY; ResizeListener callback
MapGenerateDialog extends BaseDialog — filter pipeline preview+apply; async rendering via mainExecutor
MapObjectivesDialog extends BaseDialog — reflection-based objective node editor with MapObjectivesCanvas
MapProcessorsDialog extends BaseDialog — lists/adds worldProcessor LogicBlock instances on tiles
MapPatchesDialog extends BaseDialog — add/import/remove map patches (state.patcher.patches)
EditorTool (enum) — zoom, pick, line, pencil, eraser, fill, spray; each has altModes[], key, edit, draggable
important_notes: MapEditorDialog.build() is called on shown(); full UI rebuilt each show
Tool alt-modes toggled via right-click (desktop) or double-tap (mobile)
Keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl+Z undo, Ctrl+Y redo, Ctrl+S save, Ctrl+G grid, R/E rotate, ESC menu
MapGenerateDialog(true) = applied-to-editor mode; MapGenerateDialog(false) = genfilters-only mode
MapResizeDialog: min 50, max 600 tiles; shiftX/Y shifts existing tile content
Steam workshop only available when steam=true; requires valid gamemode spawn + description ≥ 4 chars
editInGame() hides editor, sets State.playing with editor rules, spawns player unit; resumeEditing() restores
editor.tags StringMap is the persistent metadata store (name, description, author, rules JSON, genfilters JSON, locales JSON, steamid)
